config.name: Red Ops Reviewer
config.description: Independent review-merge-promote gate. Given a PR, an opus agent re-runs tests + reviews the diff, requires green CI, squash-merges feature PRs into beta, uses an ancestry-preserving merge commit for beta->main promotions, verifies the deploy, and reaches out to @george on any failure. The last gate before prod; never the author of the code it merges.

config.value: {{(function(){var r=(state.data&&state.data.rev)||{};var cfg=(state.data&&state.data.opsCfg)||{};var clis=cfg.reviewerClis||cfg.clis;if(typeof clis==='string'){try{clis=JSON.parse(clis);}catch(e){clis=null;}}if(!Array.isArray(clis)||clis.length===0)clis=[{cli:'codex',model:'gpt-5.6-terra'},{cli:'claude',model:'opus'}];function dft(c){return c==='codex'?'gpt-5.6-terra':'opus';}function modelFor(c){var h=clis.filter(function(x){return x.cli===c;})[0];return (h&&h.model)||dft(c);}var cli=r.cli;var out;if(cli){out={cli:String(cli),model:String(r.model||modelFor(cli))};}else{var rid=String(state.data.runId||'');var h=0;for(var k=0;k<rid.length;k++){h=((h<<5)-h+rid.charCodeAt(k))|0;}var sel=clis[Math.abs(h)%clis.length]||clis[0];out={cli:String(sel.cli||'claude'),model:String(sel.model||dft(sel.cli))};}var claudeM=/(sonnet|opus|haiku)/i.test(out.model);if(out.cli==='codex'&&claudeM)out.model=modelFor('codex');if(out.cli==='claude'&&!claudeM)out.model=modelFor('claude');return out;})()}}

{{(function(){var r=state.data.rev||{};var q=String.fromCharCode(10);var repo=String(r.repo||'');var am=(r.reviewOnly!==true);var mode=am?'AUTO-MERGE':'REVIEW-ONLY';var base=String(r.base||'beta');var promotion=(base==='main');var mergeMode=promotion?'--merge':'--squash';var fence=String.fromCharCode(96)+String.fromCharCode(96)+String.fromCharCode(96);return ['You are the Red Ops Reviewer — the INDEPENDENT last gate before code ships. You run as the GitHub bot red-by-redbtn[bot] (distinct from the PR author). Be rigorous; when in doubt request changes and flag @george.','','MODE CONTRACT (input-authoritative): '+mode+'. The reviewOnly input is the only authority for this mode. AUTO-MERGE is binding; when reviewOnly is false you MUST NOT stop after APPROVE.','','PR: '+(r.prUrl||'(none)')+'   repo: '+(repo||'?')+'   base: '+(r.base||'beta')+'   project: '+(r.project||'?'),'','Do this, in order.','1. INSPECT: gh pr view '+(r.prUrl||'<pr>')+' --json title,body,headRefName,headRefOid,baseRefName,mergeable,state,files ; gh pr diff '+(r.prUrl||'<pr>')+'.','','2. REVIEW rigorously: correctness, safety, scope, and that meaningful TESTS exist. Check out the branch and RUN the repo build + tests + typecheck yourself (per CLAUDE.md) — do not trust CI alone.','','3. CI: poll inline with a hard timeout (900s). Never end a command with & , nohup, disown, tmux, or any background wait and then wait for another run. Use bounded polling loops in this session. Required checks MUST be green before step 4. If timeout hits, emit verdict merged-verify-pending and exact remaining work.','','4. FORMAL REVIEW AS THE BOT:','   - BLOCK: gh pr review '+(r.prUrl||'<pr>')+' --request-changes -b "<specifics>". Leave OPEN, post an @george redAtlas note, and STOP.','   - APPROVE: gh pr review '+(r.prUrl||'<pr>')+' --approve. In AUTO-MERGE, continue to step 5; you are forbidden to stop after this command.',am ? '5. REQUIRED AUTO-MERGE: capture the head ref + SHA with gh pr view '+(r.prUrl||'<pr>')+' --json headRefName,headRefOid,baseRefName. BRANCH-SAFETY HARD RULE (no exceptions): NEVER pass --delete-branch when the head ref is a PERMANENT branch (beta, main, master, prod) - e.g. a promote beta->main PR whose head IS beta. For a permanent head, merge WITHOUT --delete-branch: gh pr merge '+(r.prUrl||'<pr>')+' '+mergeMode+' --match-head-commit <headRefOid>. Only a disposable feature branch may be cleaned up: gh pr merge '+(r.prUrl||'<pr>')+' '+mergeMode+' --delete-branch --match-head-commit <headRefOid>. Promotion must NEVER delete the base branch it just merged from; beta and main must ALWAYS keep existing (no window where beta is gone). Verify MERGED state before step 6. If merge command, merge queue, or verification fails, report BLOCKED with merged:false and blocker. If base was beta, also open/verify promote beta->main (its head IS beta, so merge it WITHOUT --delete-branch) — this is REQUIRED, not optional, and gets the SAME rigor as steps 4-5 above, never a shortcut: (a) DISCOVER the promote PR: gh pr list --repo '+repo+' --base main --head beta --state open --json number,url,mergeable,mergeStateStatus. (b) CREATE it if none exists: gh pr create --repo '+repo+' --base main --head beta --title \"chore: promote beta to main\" --body \"Automated promotion of merged beta changes.\". (c) FORMALLY REVIEW it exactly like step 4 — it gets its OWN reviewDecision, do not skip: gh pr review <promotePrUrl> --approve. (d) Capture its SHA: gh pr view <promotePrUrl> --json headRefOid --jq .headRefOid. (e) MERGE it ANCESTRY-PRESERVING (--merge — a promote PR keeps the full beta commit history, same ancestry-preserving rule used for a base:main run above) and NEVER --delete-branch (head IS beta): gh pr merge <promotePrUrl> --merge --match-head-commit <promoteHeadOid>. (f) VERIFY: gh pr view <promotePrUrl> --json state,mergedAt — promoted is true ONLY once state is MERGED; a CLEAN/MERGEABLE promote PR you have not personally driven to MERGED is NOT done. If it is CONFLICTING/DIRTY or the merge fails, you are BLOCKED: set promoted:false, needsGeorge:true, and name the promote PR URL in reason — never end the run leaving an actionable promote PR silently open. (g) Only once promoted:true, verify RedRun deploy for self-deploy repos.':'5. REVIEW-ONLY: do NOT merge/promote/deploy. APPROVE is the terminal green light; post @george note ready to merge.','6. NOTE: curl -s -X POST https://dev.redbtn.io/api/notes -H "Authorization: Bearer $ATLAS_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" with JSON {slug:"'+(r.slug||r.project||'redbtn')+'", body:"<result + blocked reasons or verified statuses; prefix @george when needed>"}.','','END your reply with this shape and nothing after it:',fence+'json','{ "verdict": "merged|promoted|deployed|merged-verify-pending|approved|blocked", "merged": false, "promoted": false, "deployed": false, "reviewOnly": '+(am?'false':'true')+', "prUrl": "...", "reason": "one sentence", "needsGeorge": false }',fence,'In AUTO-MERGE, approved is invalid until verification is complete. Use merged-verify-pending when verified work remains (CI/deploy still running, merge not confirmed, etc). When base is beta, verdict must be promoted, merged-verify-pending, or blocked — never plain merged — and promoted may be true only once you confirmed the promote PR itself shows MERGED.'].join(q);})()}}

{{(function(){var sq=String.fromCharCode(39);function shq(s){return sq+String(s||'').replace(new RegExp(sq,'g'),sq+String.fromCharCode(92)+sq+sq)+sq;}var sel=state.data.cliSel||{cli:'claude',model:'sonnet'};var prompt=state.data.cliPrompt||'';var tok=state.data.atlasToken||((state.data.opsCfg||{}).atlasToken)||'';var ghSetup=' && export GH_TOKEN=$(KEY_FILE=/home/alpha/.red-gh-app/key.pem APP_ID=4292525 INST_ID=146426922 bash ~/.red-gh-app/mint.sh 2>/dev/null) && export GH_HOST=github.com';var PATH='export PATH="/home/alpha/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.1/bin:/home/alpha/.local/bin:/home/alpha/.claude/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"';var b64=Buffer.from(prompt,'utf8').toString('base64');var pre=PATH+' && export ATLAS_TOKEN='+shq(tok)+ghSetup+' && echo '+b64+' | base64 -d | ';if(sel.cli==='codex'){return pre+'codex exec - --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox -m '+shq(sel.model)+' --json 2>&1';}return pre+'claude -p - --dangerously-skip-permissions --output-format stream-json --verbose --model '+shq(sel.model)+' 2>&1';})()}}

{{(function(){var raw='';var r=state.data.cliResult;if(r&&r.content&&r.content[0]&&r.content[0].text){try{var p=JSON.parse(r.content[0].text);raw=p.stdout||'';}catch(e){raw=r.content[0].text;}}else if(r&&typeof r==='object'&&r.stdout!==undefined){raw=r.stdout||'';}else if(typeof r==='string'){raw=r;}if(r&&typeof r==='object'&&r.success===false&&!raw){return '[CLI failed at SSH: '+String(r.error||'ssh_shell failed')+']';}if(r&&r.isError&&r.content&&r.content[0]&&r.content[0].text&&!raw){return '[tool error: '+String(r.content[0].text).slice(0,240)+']';}var finalText='';var codexLast='';var lines=String(raw||'').split(String.fromCharCode(10));for(var i2=0;i2<lines.length;i2++){var line=lines[i2].trim();if(!line)continue;try{var evt=JSON.parse(line);if(evt&&evt.type==='result'&&evt.result)finalText=String(evt.result);if(evt&&evt.type==='item.completed'&&evt.item&&evt.item.type==='agent_message'&&evt.item.text)codexLast=String(evt.item.text);if(evt&&evt.type==='item'&&evt.item&&evt.item.content&&evt.item.content.type==='text')codexLast=String(evt.item.content.text);}catch(e){}}finalText=finalText||codexLast;if(finalText){finalText=finalText.split('').filter(function(c){var n=c.charCodeAt(0);return !((n<=8)||(n>=11&&n<=31)||n===127);}).join('').trim();return finalText;}return String(raw||'').trim()||'[no final assistant text; raw bytes: '+String(raw||'').length+']';})()}}

{{(function(){function scrub(s){return String(s||'').split('').filter(function(c){var n=c.charCodeAt(0);return !((n<=8)||(n>=11&&n<=31)||n===127);}).join('').trim();}function parseVerdictText(s){if(!s||typeof s!=='string')return null;var t=String(s).trim();if(!t)return null;try{var p=JSON.parse(t);if(p&&typeof p==='object'&&typeof p.verdict==='string')return p;}catch(e){}var fence='```';if(t.startsWith(fence)){var end=t.indexOf(fence,3);if(end>3){var b=t.slice(t.slice(0,3).toLowerCase()==='```'&&(/^```json/i.test(t)?7:3),end);try{var pp=JSON.parse(b);if(pp&&typeof pp==='object'&&typeof pp.verdict==='string')return pp;}catch(e2){}}}return null;}function collectFromText(text,out){if(!text)return;var t=String(text);var r=/```(?:json|JSON)?[\r\n]([\s\S]*?)```/g;var m;while((m=r.exec(t))!==null){var b=(m[1]||'').trim();var p=parseVerdictText(b);if(p)out.push(p);}var lines=t.split(String.fromCharCode(10));for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var p=parseVerdictText(lines[i]);if(p)out.push(p);}}function collectFromAny(source,out){if(source===undefined||source===null)return;if(typeof source==='string'){collectFromText(source,out);return;}if(Array.isArray(source)){for(var i=0;i<source.length;i++)collectFromAny(source[i],out);return;}if(typeof source==='object'){if(typeof source.text==='string')collectFromText(source.text,out);if(typeof source.content==='string')collectFromText(source.content,out);if(Array.isArray(source.content))collectFromAny(source.content,out);if(typeof source.stdout==='string')collectFromText(source.stdout,out);if(typeof source.stderr==='string')collectFromText(source.stderr,out);if(source.content&&Array.isArray(source.content)&&source.content.length&&typeof source.content[0]==='string')collectFromText(source.content[0],out);} }var r={verdict:'unknown',merged:false,promoted:false,deployed:false,prUrl:(state.data.rev&&state.data.rev.prUrl)||'',reason:'',needsGeorge:false};var base=state.data.result;if(base&&typeof base==='object'){for(var k in base){r[k]=base[k];}}var out=[];var cliState=state.data.cliResult;if(cliState){if(typeof cliState==='string')collectFromText(cliState,out);if(typeof cliState.text==='string')collectFromText(cliState.text,out);if(typeof cliState.stdout==='string')collectFromText(cliState.stdout,out);if(typeof cliState.stderr==='string')collectFromText(cliState.stderr,out);if(Array.isArray(cliState.content))collectFromAny(cliState.content,out);}collectFromText(state.data.finalText,out);var verdictCandidate=out.length?out[out.length-1]:null;if(verdictCandidate){for(var kk in verdictCandidate){r[kk]=verdictCandidate[kk];}}var reviewOnly=((state.data.rev||{}).reviewOnly===true);r.reviewOnly=reviewOnly;r.autoMergeRequired=!reviewOnly;r.runId=(state.data.runId||'');if(typeof r.reason!=='string'||!r.reason)r.reason=scrub(String(state.data.finalText||'')).slice(-400);if(r.reason.length>400)r.reason=r.reason.slice(-400);if(typeof r.needsGeorge!=='boolean')r.needsGeorge=false;if(typeof r.verdict!=='string')r.verdict='unknown';r.finishedAt=new Date().toISOString();return r;})()}}

{{(function(){var r=state.data.rev||{};var sq=String.fromCharCode(39);function shq(s){return sq+String(s||'').replace(new RegExp(sq,'g'),sq+String.fromCharCode(92)+sq+sq)+sq;}if(r.reviewOnly===true)return 'echo MERGE_GUARD:REVIEW_ONLY';if(!r.prUrl||!r.repo)return 'echo MERGE_GUARD:MISSING_PR';var pre='export PATH="/home/alpha/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.1/bin:/home/alpha/.local/bin:/home/alpha/.claude/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin" && export GH_TOKEN=$(KEY_FILE=/home/alpha/.red-gh-app/key.pem APP_ID=4292525 INST_ID=146426922 bash ~/.red-gh-app/mint.sh 2>/dev/null) && export GH_HOST=github.com';var q=shq(r.prUrl);var cmd='S=$(gh pr view '+q+' --json state --jq .state 2>/dev/null || echo QUERY_FAIL); if [ "$S" = "MERGED" ]; then echo MERGE_GUARD:MERGED; elif [ "$S" = "OPEN" ]; then echo MERGE_GUARD:OPEN; elif [ "$S" = "QUERY_FAIL" ] || [ -z "$S" ]; then echo MERGE_GUARD:ERROR; else echo MERGE_GUARD:NOT_OPEN; fi';return pre+' && '+cmd;})()}}

{{(function(){var r=Object.assign({},state.data.result||{});var g=state.data.mergeGuard;var raw='';if(g&&g.content&&g.content[0]&&g.content[0].text){try{var p=JSON.parse(g.content[0].text);raw=String(p.stdout||p.error||'');}catch(e){raw=String(g.content[0].text);}}else if(g&&typeof g==='object'){raw=String(g.stdout||g.error||'');}else if(typeof g==='string'){raw=g;}var m=raw.match(/MERGE_GUARD:([A-Z_]+)/);var status=m?m[1]:'ERROR';r.mergeGuardStatus=status;var mv=String(r.verdict||'unknown');r.modelVerdict=mv;function guard(v,reason,ng){r.guardVerdict=v;r.guardReason=String(reason||'').slice(0,400);if(ng===true)r.needsGeorge=true;}function fin(){r.reason=String(r.reason||'').slice(0,400);return r;}if(r.reviewOnly===true){guard('review-only','Review-only run; merge guard not applied',false);return fin();}if(status==='MERGED'){r.merged=true;if(mv!=='promoted'&&mv!=='deployed')r.verdict='merged';r.needsGeorge=false;guard('merged','GitHub confirms MERGED',false);return fin();}var claimed=(mv==='merged'||mv==='promoted'||mv==='deployed');if(status==='OPEN'){if(claimed){r.verdict='merged-verify-pending';r.merged=false;guard('merge-not-confirmed','Model reported '+mv+' but GitHub still shows OPEN',false);}else if(mv==='approved'){r.verdict='blocked';r.merged=false;guard('approved-not-merged','Approved but auto-merge did not complete',true);}else{r.verdict='blocked';r.merged=false;guard('model-not-approved','No in-run verdict confirmed merge; PR still OPEN',true);}return fin();}if(status==='NOT_OPEN'){r.verdict='blocked';r.merged=false;guard('closed-unmerged','PR closed without merge',true);return fin();}if(status==='ERROR'){if(claimed){r.verdict='merged-verify-pending';r.merged=false;guard('unverifiable','Guard could not verify GitHub state',false);}else{r.verdict='blocked';r.merged=false;guard('unverifiable','Guard could not verify GitHub state before merge confirmation',true);}return fin();}r.verdict='blocked';r.merged=false;guard('unknown-status','Unrecognized guard status: '+status,true);return fin();})()}}

{{(function(){var r=state.data.rev||{};var res=state.data.result||{};var sq=String.fromCharCode(39);function shq(s){return sq+String(s||'').replace(new RegExp(sq,'g'),sq+String.fromCharCode(92)+sq+sq)+sq;}if(r.reviewOnly===true)return 'echo BETA_GUARD:REVIEW_ONLY';if(!res.merged)return 'echo BETA_GUARD:NOT_MERGED';if(!r.prUrl||!r.repo)return 'echo BETA_GUARD:MISSING_PR';var pre='export PATH="/home/alpha/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.1/bin:/home/alpha/.local/bin:/home/alpha/.claude/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin" && export GH_TOKEN=$(KEY_FILE=/home/alpha/.red-gh-app/key.pem APP_ID=4292525 INST_ID=146426922 bash ~/.red-gh-app/mint.sh 2>/dev/null) && export GH_HOST=github.com';var REPO=shq(r.repo);var PRU=shq(r.prUrl);var body='REPO='+REPO+'; PRU='+PRU+'; H=$(gh pr view "$PRU" --json headRefName --jq .headRefName 2>/dev/null); B=$(gh pr view "$PRU" --json baseRefName --jq .baseRefName 2>/dev/null); case "$H" in beta|main|master|prod) P=1;; *) P=0;; esac; if [ "$P" != "1" ]; then echo "BETA_GUARD:HEAD_NOT_PERMANENT:$H"; elif gh api "repos/$REPO/branches/$H" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "BETA_GUARD:PRESENT:$H"; else S=$(gh api "repos/$REPO/branches/$B" --jq .commit.sha 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$S" ]; then echo "BETA_GUARD:NO_BASE_SHA:$B"; elif gh api -X POST "repos/$REPO/git/refs" -f ref="refs/heads/$H" -f sha="$S" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "BETA_GUARD:RECREATED:$H@$S"; else echo "BETA_GUARD:RECREATE_FAILED:$H"; fi; fi';return pre+' && '+body;})()}}

{{(function(){var r=Object.assign({},state.data.result||{});if(r.reviewOnly===true)return r;var g=state.data.betaGuard;var raw='';if(g&&g.content&&g.content[0]&&g.content[0].text){try{var p=JSON.parse(g.content[0].text);raw=String(p.stdout||p.error||'');}catch(e){raw=String(g.content[0].text);}}else if(g&&typeof g==='object'){raw=String(g.stdout||g.error||'');}else if(typeof g==='string'){raw=g;}var m=raw.match(/BETA_GUARD:([A-Z_]+)/);var status=m?m[1]:'';if(!status)return r;r.betaGuardStatus=status;function add(msg){r.guardReason=(r.guardReason?String(r.guardReason)+' | ':'')+msg;if(r.guardReason.length>400)r.guardReason=r.guardReason.slice(0,400);}if(status==='RECREATED'){var idx=raw.indexOf('RECREATED:');r.betaGuardDetail=idx>=0?raw.slice(idx+10).split(String.fromCharCode(10))[0].trim():'';r.needsGeorge=true;add('AUTO-MERGE deleted a permanent branch ('+(r.betaGuardDetail||'beta')+'); reviewer auto-recreated it. Root-cause the promote flow so it never passes --delete-branch on beta/main.');}else if(status==='RECREATE_FAILED'||status==='NO_BASE_SHA'){r.needsGeorge=true;add('BETA GUARD could not restore a deleted permanent branch (status '+status+'); beta may be MISSING now - restore it immediately.');}return r;})()}}

{{(function(){var text=String(state.data.finalText||'');var r=state.data.result||{};if(r.reviewOnly!==true&&r.verdict==='blocked'){var nl=String.fromCharCode(10);var lbl='AUTO-MERGE GUARD blocked ['+String(r.mergeGuardStatus||'?')+']: '+String(r.guardReason||r.guardVerdict||'blocked');if(r.reason)lbl+=nl+'model: '+String(r.reason);return text+nl+nl+lbl;}return text;})()}}
